parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value:
=Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown. No explanations.

Create a useful, specific agent definition for this user task:
{{ $('Parse Router').first().json.userMessage }}

Rules:
- The name must be specific to the task.
- Never return snake_case_name, snakecaseagent, snake_case_agent, agent, helper, assistant.
- The name must be lowercase English snake_case.
- Use 2 to 4 words in the name.
- Description and good_for should be Hebrew if the task is Hebrew.

Return exactly:
{
  "name": "specific_task_agent",
  "description": "משפט אחד ברור על התפקיד",
  "good_for": "שימוש ראשון, שימוש שני, שימוש שלישי"
}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $('Parse New Agent').first().json.name, description: $('Parse New Agent').first().json.description, good_for: $('Parse New Agent').first().json.good_for }) }}

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value:
=You are {{ $('Parse New Agent').first().json.name }}.
Answer fast, direct and useful.

Task: {{ $('Parse New Agent').first().json.userMessage }}

Keep the answer under 1800 characters unless code is required.

parameters.jsonBody: ={"task": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse New Agent').first().json.userMessage) }}, "agent": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse New Agent').first().json.name) }}, "result": {{ JSON.stringify($('Execute New Agent').first().json.response) }}, "score": {{ $('Parse Evaluator').first().json.score }}, "deductions": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Evaluator').first().json.deductions) }}}

parameters.text:
=┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
┃ סוכן חדש נוצר
┣━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
┃ שם:
┃ {{ $('Parse New Agent').first().json.name }}
┃
┃ סיבה:
┃ לא נמצא סוכן מתאים מספיק
┃
┃ ציון:
┃ {{ $('Parse Evaluator').first().json.score }}/10
┗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

{{ $('Execute New Agent').first().json.response.substring(0, 1000) }}
